one_sentence_purpose: A TypeScript project template with DDD architecture, enforced layer boundaries, mutation testing, and AI-assistant guardrails for vibe coding without sacrificing quality.
target_users: TypeScript developers who use AI coding assistants and want architectural discipline baked in from day one
visual_metaphors: concentric circles representing DDD layers (domain at center, infrastructure at outer ring)
a tuning fork emitting clean sine waves symbolizing quality vibrations
architectural blueprint with glowing boundary lines

assets_needed.desc: Wide banner on white background with concentric DDD layer rings and project name in TypeScript blue
Wide banner on dark background with concentric DDD layer rings and project name in TypeScript blue
Square logo on white background featuring a tuning fork integrated with TypeScript brackets
Square logo on dark background featuring a tuning fork integrated with TypeScript brackets
GitHub social preview card with tagline, DDD layer diagram, and TypeScript blue palette
